title: General Aptitude - Quantitative Aptitude - Prime Numbers

questions.question:
​​​​​Let \( p_1 \) and \( p_2 \) denote two arbitrary prime numbers. Which one of the following statemetns is correct for all values of \( p_1 \) and \( p_2 \)?

 



GATE CSE 2025 | Set 2 | GA Question: 5
options: \( p_1p_2 \) is not a prime number
questions.correct_answer: \( p_1p_2 \) is not a prime number
